The following events took place in approximately '''12,720 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists arrive in what would eventually become the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The [[Herglic/Legends|Herglics]] come into contact and begin to trade with them. Beginning of the [[Tapani calendar]].<ref name="LoE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>

*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
